args: if [ ! -f "$CODEX_SECRETS_DIR/symphony-linear.env" ]; then echo "Missing $CODEX_SECRETS_DIR/symphony-linear.env with LINEAR_API_KEY" >&2; exit 1; fi; set -a; source "$CODEX_SECRETS_DIR/symphony-linear.env"; set +a; SYMPHONY="$(command -v symphony || true)"; if [ -z "$SYMPHONY" ] && [ -x "CODEX_LOCAL_BIN_DIR/symphony" ]; then SYMPHONY="CODEX_LOCAL_BIN_DIR/symphony"; fi; if [ -z "$SYMPHONY" ]; then echo "symphony not found; run make install-local in SYMPHONY_ROOT" >&2; exit 127; fi; exec "$SYMPHONY" mcp
